title: Morning Routine
scene: 你和妈妈在卧室，该起床准备上学了。

turns.en: Time to get up! It's already seven o'clock.
Can I sleep five more minutes?
No, you'll be late.
Okay, I'm getting up.
Go brush your teeth and wash your face.
What's for breakfast?
Pancakes and milk. They're on the table.
Thanks, Mom!

title: Doing Chores
scene: 周六下午，爸爸让你帮忙做家务。

turns.cn: 能帮我把垃圾拿出去吗？
turns.en: Could you take out the trash for me?
Sure, no problem.

turns.cn: 然后把你的房间收拾一下。
turns.en: And then clean up your room.

turns.cn: 我的房间已经很整洁了。
turns.en: My room is already pretty tidy.
There are clothes all over the floor.
Okay, I'll tidy up right now.

turns.cn: 做得好！晚上请你吃披萨。
turns.en: Good job! I'll treat you to pizza tonight.
Awesome! Thanks, Dad!

title: Asking for Help
scene: 你在书房写作业，遇到了难题。

turns.en: Hey, can you help me with something?
What's up?
I can't figure out this math problem.
Let me take a look.

turns.cn: 你需要先把这个方程式化简。
turns.en: You need to simplify this equation first.
Oh, I see! Thanks!

turns.cn: 不客气。有需要随时叫我。
turns.en: You're welcome. Just let me know if you need anything.
